lessons.title: Strands 1-2 Review
lessons.description: Grade 3 FINAL ASSESSMENT & CLOSURE - Review of Strand 1 (Characteristics of Living Things) and Strand 2 (Environments & Habitats).
lessons.content:
## Review Activity

Let us review what we learned in Strands 1 and 2! Strand 1 covered the characteristics of living things and how to classify them. Strand 2 covered environments, habitats, food chains, and conservation.

blocks.content: Let us review what we learned in Strands 1 and 2! Strand 1 covered the characteristics of living things and how to classify them. Strand 2 covered environments, habitats, food chains, and conservation.

terms.definition: Special features or qualities of living things
To sort things into groups based on shared features

terms.thai: ห่วงโซ่อาหาร
terms.definition: A path showing how energy moves from one organism to another

terms.thai: การอนุรักษ์
terms.definition: Protecting nature and using resources wisely

lessons.title: Strands 3-4 Review
lessons.description: Grade 3 FINAL ASSESSMENT & CLOSURE - Review of Strand 3 (Matter & Materials) and Strand 4 (Forces & Motion).
lessons.content:
## Review Activity

Let us review Strands 3 and 4! Strand 3 covered matter and materials including properties and states of matter. Strand 4 covered forces and motion including push, pull, and balanced forces.

blocks.content: Let us review Strands 3 and 4! Strand 3 covered matter and materials. Strand 4 covered forces and motion.

terms.definition: Anything that has mass and takes up space
A special quality of a material
A push or a pull on an object

terms.thai: การเคลื่อนที่
terms.definition: The act of moving

lessons.title: Strands 5-6 Review
lessons.description: Grade 3 FINAL ASSESSMENT & CLOSURE - Review of Strand 5 (Energy) and Strand 6 (Our Changing Earth).
lessons.content:
## Review Activity

Let us review Strands 5 and 6! Strand 5 covered different forms of energy and energy sources. Strand 6 covered Earth's surface features, weather, and day and night.

blocks.content: Let us review Strands 5 and 6! Strand 5 covered energy. Strand 6 covered our changing Earth.

terms.definition: The ability to do work
Changing from one form to another

terms.thai: การกัดเซาะ
terms.definition: The wearing away of land by wind, water, or ice

terms.thai: การหมุนรอบตัวเอง
terms.definition: The spinning of Earth on its axis

lessons.title: Strands 7-8 Review
lessons.description: Grade 3 FINAL ASSESSMENT & CLOSURE - Review of Strand 7 (The Sky Above) and Strand 8 (Scientific Method).
lessons.content:
## Review Activity

Let us review Strands 7 and 8! Strand 7 covered the Sun, Earth, Moon, and moon phases. Strand 8 covered the scientific method and science tools.

blocks.content: Let us review Strands 7 and 8! Strand 7 covered the sky above. Strand 8 covered the scientific method.

terms.thai: ข้างขึ้นข้างแรม
terms.definition: The changing shapes of the Moon as seen from Earth

terms.thai: วิธีทางวิทยาศาสตร์
terms.definition: The steps scientists use to investigate questions

terms.thai: กล้องโทรทรรศน์
terms.definition: A tool that makes distant objects look closer
A statement about what you learned from an experiment

lessons.title: Final Assessment: Strands 1-4
lessons.description: Grade 3 FINAL ASSESSMENT & CLOSURE - Final assessment covering Strands 1 through 4.
lessons.content:
## Final Assessment

This assessment covers Strands 1 through 4. You will be tested on characteristics of living things, environments and habitats, matter and materials, and forces and motion.

blocks.content: This assessment covers Strands 1 through 4. Good luck!

lessons.titleThai: แบบทดสอบสุดท้าย: Strands 1-4

lessons.title: Final Assessment: Strands 5-8
lessons.description: Grade 3 FINAL ASSESSMENT & CLOSURE - Final assessment covering Strands 5 through 8.
lessons.content:
## Final Assessment

This assessment covers Strands 5 through 8. You will be tested on energy, our changing Earth, the sky above, and the scientific method.

blocks.content: This assessment covers Strands 5 through 8. Good luck!

lessons.titleThai: แบบทดสอบสุดท้าย: Strands 5-8

lessons.title: Year Celebration
lessons.description: Grade 3 FINAL ASSESSMENT & CLOSURE - Celebrating a year of science learning and growth.
lessons.content:
## Introduction

Congratulations! You have completed Grade 3 science! This lesson is a celebration of all the amazing things you learned this year. Take a moment to reflect on your growth as a scientist.

## Main Content

**Look How Far You Have Come**

This year, you learned about living things, habitats, materials, forces, energy, the sky, and the scientific method. You conducted experiments, made observations, and drew conclusions. You are now a more skilled and knowledgeable scientist!

blocks.content: Congratulations! You have completed Grade 3 science! This lesson is a celebration of all the amazing things you learned this year.

terms.definition: To do something special for an important event

terms.thai: ความสำเร็จ
terms.definition: Something you accomplish through effort
Becoming better or more developed

lessons.titleThai: ฉลองปลายปี

lessons.title: Science Portfolio
lessons.description: Grade 3 FINAL ASSESSMENT & CLOSURE - Creating a portfolio of your best science work from the year.
lessons.content:
## Introduction

Create a portfolio of your best science work from this year. Include your favorite experiments, observations, drawings, and journal entries. This portfolio shows your growth as a scientist.

## Main Content
n**What to Include**

Select your best work from each strand. Include lab reports, drawings, and journal entries. Write a reflection about what you learned. Share your portfolio with your classmates and family.

blocks.content: Create a portfolio of your best science work from this year. Include your favorite experiments, observations, drawings, and journal entries.

terms.thai: แฟ้มสะสมผลงาน
terms.definition: A collection of your best work
Thinking carefully about what you learned
To choose the best ones

lessons.titleThai: แฟ้มสะสมผลงานวิทยาศาสตร์
